cards.title: Sleep Disorders & CBT-I
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Insomnia: ISI score >14 = moderate-severe
  • CBT-I protocol: Sleep restriction + stimulus control + cognitive therapy
  • Sleep hygiene checklist (14 points)
  • Naturopathic: Melatonin 0.5–3mg, valerian, L-theanine, Mg

cards.title: Sleep Optimisation
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Chronotype assessment & personalised timing
  • Temperature: 16–19°C optimal
  • Light: Blackout curtains, blue light glasses
  • Pre-sleep protocol (wind-down 60 min)

cards.title: OSA & RLS
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • OSA screening: STOP-BANG questionnaire
  • AHI interpretation: 5–15 mild, 15–30 moderate, >30 severe
  • RLS: Fe (ferritin >100), Mg, folate, avoid caffeine/alcohol
  • PLMD vs RLS differentiation
